title: Bowling centenary mixed singles tournament huge sucess
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Forty-eight top bowlers from...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Forty-eight top bowlers from across the country gathered at the Knysna Bowling Club over last weekend to participate in the inaugural Knysna Bowling Club Centenary Mixed Singles Tournament.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Forty-eight top bowlers from across the country gathered at the Knysna Bowling Club over last weekend to participate in the inaugural Knysna Bowling Club Centenary Mixed Singles Tournament."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event was sponsored by Fairtree Capital and Currency Assist."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The entire competition was conducted with the use of a digital platform and app specifically developed by the Professional Bowling Association with the support of Fairtree Capital.","html":"The entire competition was conducted with the use of a digital platform and app specifically developed by the Professional Bowling Association with the support of Fairtree Capital."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The app allowed for seamless administration, live scoring, and real-time match updates, enabling players to focus on their game and spectators - in person or remotely - to follow every bowl with ease.","html":"The app allowed for seamless administration, live scoring, and real-time match updates, enabling players to focus on their game and spectators - in person or remotely - to follow every bowl with ease."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After a round-robin stage, eight bowlers emerged as section winners:","html":"After a round-robin stage, eight bowlers emerged as section winners:"},{"type":"list","items":["Mathew Blumrick","Jacques Barnard","Susan Meyer","Donald Olivier","Guy Etherington","Zakes Salimane","Brett Clark","Chris Baker"],"ordered":false},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In a high-quality final, Zakes Salimane triumphed over Donald Olivier to claim the inaugural title."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Zakes Salimane","html":"Zakes Salimane"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Club president John Rimbault reaffirmed Knysna Bowling Club's commitment to driving innovation within the sport, promising that this centenary event is just the beginning of new and exciting developments for bowlers and spectators.","html":"Club president John Rimbault reaffirmed Knysna Bowling Club's commitment to driving innovation within the sport, promising that this centenary event is just the beginning of new and exciting developments for bowlers and spectators."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
